subject: Re:
body:
RE my situation in palm beach,,, you might get a call
from the press,,, just take a message.

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>  
> 
> Hi Jeffrey. I want to thank you for your candor with
> me on Friday. I
> really appreciate your knowledge and insight.and you
> really have me
> thinking.... Ike and I have done some research on
> the Internet and feel
> we have more questions for the doctor as well as
> more of our own due
> diligence. We have an appt tomorrow morning with my
> doctor at 9am.
> 
> Also, I can't stress enough how important my job is
> with you. I want to
> continue working for you no matter what. I think I
> have proven to you I
> will be in NY no matter what day of the week you are
> around...if you are
> in town, I've been there. 
> 
> Right now, who even knows if I can get pregnant (or
> even if I'm going to
> go thru with this at all) and worrying about this
> may be all for not.
> Also, wanted to say how kind and generous it is of
> you to offer to pay
> for the procedure, or keep me (and Rich) on our
> insurance...or just tell
> me not to worry about money. REALLY, very nice of
> you.
> 
> On another note, I'm VERY happy that you have things
> all straightened
> away on your end. I'm sure it's a huge relief and
> I'm glad it can be put
> behind you. 
> 
>  
>  
>  
> Lesley Groff
> Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
>  
>  
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
RE my situation in palm beach,,, you might get a call
from the press,,, just take a message.

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey. I want to thank you for your candor with
me on Friday. I
really appreciate your knowledge and insight.and you
really have me
thinking.... Ike and I have done some research on
the Internet and feel
we have more questions for the doctor as well as
more of our own due
diligence. We have an appt tomorrow morning with my
doctor at 9am.

Also, I can't stress enough how important my job is
with you. I want to
continue working for you no matter what. I think I
have proven to you I
will be in NY no matter what day of the week you are
around...if you are
in town, I've been there.

Right now, who even knows if I can get pregnant (or
even if I'm going to
go thru with this at all) and worrying about this
may be all for not.
Also, wanted to say how kind and generous it is of
you to offer to pay
for the procedure, or keep me (and Rich) on our
insurance...or just tell
me not to worry about money. REALLY, very nice of
you.

On another note, I'm VERY happy that you have things
all straightened
away on your end. I'm sure it's a huge relief and
I'm glad it can be put
behind you.

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
